content.en:
"Haichen's controller is miserable, he has been sealed and imprisoned for 100 million realms, with his temperament, I'm afraid he will go crazy!"

"This is not called miserable, this is called good luck, if you offend the eternal controller with a terrifying background, the controller of Haichen is afraid that it will be even worse, maybe it will fall directly. Fortunately this time, he offended the senior brother of the Light Controller. "

"Senior Brother of the Light Master, doesn't this mean that this is the fifth personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor?"

"Oh my God, the Ten Elements Ancestor has actually accepted the fifth personal disciple, and there is no news coming out before!"

"The Ten Elements Ancestor has always kept a low profile, except for the disciples of the Ten Elements Ancestor, the other Eternal Controllers naturally don't know. "

These Eternal Masters discussed, and Ye Tian left.

Subsequently, he came to Tongyang Mountain and entered Tongyang Mountain.

At this time, many people knew that the eternal controller of Tongyang Mountain was Ye Tian, but they also knew Ye Tian's background identity, so they naturally didn't dare to have any opinions.

......

Tongyang Mountain.

After Ye Tian regained control of this place with his own copy body, he continued to comprehend the Fire Realm River Monument here.

Although the Fire Realm River Tablet didn't help him much, it was at least much faster than cultivating alone.

Time passed, and finally after ten thousand years of boundary rivers, Ye Tian came to Tuta again.

He was able to continue to enter the Misty Adventure plane, so he paid the ticket cost of a key fragment to enter the Misty Adventure plane again.

This time, he found that the number of key fragments seemed to be much less than the last time, and it was estimated that Tuta was slow to replenish the treasure chest, after all, ten thousand times ago, he found a large number of key fragments from here.

It wasn't always possible to replenish them all now, so he certainly didn't look for as many key fragments as he used to.

However, compared to the other Eternal Masters, the key fragments he found were terrifying enough.

After a period of time, Ye Tian came out of the foggy exploration space.

It's a pity that I didn't find the fragments of the first and second keys this time, so I couldn't get together a small key.

"You can't synthesize a small key, let's use some serial keys to synthesize a small treasure box and a big treasure box first, although some of the resources that come out are not as good as the Golden Crow Blood Fruit, but they are also quite good, and they can improve their strength a little bit. "

So, Ye Tian came to the exchange office in Tuta.

Here, there is a place dedicated to the Synthesizing Treasure Box with a Serial Key.

Treasure Box Crafting Table.

Ye Tian came here and began to synthesize the serial key.

At this time, some Eternal Masters noticed Ye Tian.

"It's the Infinite Master, he is standing on the treasure box synthesis table, it seems that he has obtained the serial key, and he is about to synthesize the treasure box. "

"Oh my God, he's so lucky, not long after he came to Tucheng, he synthesized a small key, exchanged for the Golden Crow Blood Fruit, and now he wants to synthesize a treasure box, even if it is a small treasure box, it is enough to make people envious!"

"Curious that the treasure chests synthesized by the Infinite Masters will open treasures?"

Soon, Ye Tian put the thirty-six serial keys on the treasure box synthesis table.

"Synthesize!"

The thirty-six serial keys were shrouded in light on the treasure box synthesis table, and soon turned into a treasure box.

Ye Tian took the treasure box and opened it.

Airplanes!

A treasure floated out.

"It's a subordinate Realm Keeper. "

The Eternal Master shouted.

It is indeed very good to control the boundary soldiers, but the lower control of the boundary soldiers is only of great use to the first and second domain level controllers, and it is naturally of little value to the second realm level controllers like Ye Tian.

For many of the Eternal Masters present, the lower Realm Masters were indeed very ordinary.

"The Infinite Master's luck this time is not good, he only opened the lower Realm Controller, and wasted a small treasure box!" said a Realm-level Master.

But at this moment, Ye Tian took out thirty-six serial keys.

"What, the Infinite Mastery has even assembled a set of thirty-six serial keys?"

The Eternal Masters around them were stunned.

What kind of luck is this!

You must know that many Eternal Masters have lived in Tucheng for countless years, but they have not been able to get together the thirty-six serial keys, mainly because the integer key fragments are of high value and scarce, so they are not sold.

Those shops sold ordinary key fragments, so the average Eternal Master couldn't muster together thirty-six serial key fragments, and there was no way to combine them into a small treasure box.

As for Ye Tian, he had already gathered two small treasure boxes.

Airplanes!

The small treasure box was synthesized, and Ye Tian opened it again.

I saw a treasure emerge, it was a grass that emitted golden thunder and lightning.

"It's Jin Yan Thunder Grass, it can temper the will, the value is not bad, but it's not a good treasure, and it belongs to the upper middle among the treasures opened in the small treasure box. "

Said an eternal master.

Everyone thought that the journey of the Endless Controller to open the treasure box was over, but who knew that Ye Tian took out thirty-six keys again.

？？？

The Eternal Master is confused, what is the situation?

Ye Tian still has thirty-six key fragments?

Soon, Ye Tian opened the third treasure box.

The treasure in the third treasure box is even better than the Golden Flame Thunder Grass, it is the Yongyang Fire Liquid, which can refine the body of control, although it is far inferior to the Golden Crow Blood Fruit, but the effect is still good, and it has a good refining effect on the seventh-level controller.

"The Endless Master has gathered three small treasure boxes, there should be no more, if there is any more, he is undoubtedly a relative of the old man of Guishan. Said one of the Eternal Masters.

And at this moment, Ye Tian took out seventy-two key fragments and put them on the treasure box synthesis table.

Airplanes!

A large treasure box appeared.

"This is the big treasure box, my God, the big treasure box must be together with seventy-two serial key fragments, the difficulty is second only to the small key!"

They were completely dumbfounded.

It is true that Ye Tian didn't get together the fourth small treasure box, but he got together a big treasure box!

Immediately, everyone was looking forward to what this big treasure box could open?

It's been a long time since they've seen an Eternal Master open a large treasure box, so they're looking forward to it.

Click!

The big treasure box is opened.

A golden dot emerged, and this golden dot seemed to be a light, not like an object, but as if it was a special energy.

Some of the Eternal Masters looked at the golden dot and did not recognize it.

But there was still an eternal controller who knew the goods, and exclaimed on the spot: "Oh my God, this is the Doomsday Golden Light Bead, it is said that it is a ray of doomsday golden light that can only be born after the destruction of the Eternal Realm, and only by collecting ten rays of Doomsday Golden Light can you synthesize a Doomsday Golden Light Bead." This may seem like a dot, but it's actually a bead that is tiny to the limit. It would take a long time for the Eternal Realm to be destroyed, and once an Eternal Master was born, the Eternal Realm could hardly be destroyed. It is only when the Eternal Controller has never been born and the cultivation is not perfect, this will slowly decline, and finally usher in the day of destruction, such an eternal realm is too rare. "

"How could such a treasure be opened in a big treasure box?"

"Strictly speaking, the big treasure box can open any treasure, and it is normal to open the Doomsday Golden Light Bead. What was surprising was that the old man of Kameyama actually had the Doomsday Golden Light Bead, and he had collected at least ten Eternal Realms and then destroyed and born of the Doomsday Golden Light! "

"It doesn't have to be collected by the old man of Kameyama, it may have been obtained by accident!"

These eternal masters are envious and jealous at this time!

And Ye Tian was also very surprised, he actually opened such a treasure, this time his luck is really good!
